name: simple_select_limit
setup: CREATE TABLE trades (instrument_id DOUBLE PRECISION, price DOUBLE PRECISION, quantity DOUBLE PRECISION)

name: select_limit_truncates
setup: CREATE TABLE data (x DOUBLE PRECISION, y DOUBLE PRECISION)

name: where_filter
setup: CREATE TABLE trades (instrument_id DOUBLE PRECISION, price DOUBLE PRECISION, quantity DOUBLE PRECISION)
query: SELECT instrument_id, price FROM trades WHERE price > 100 LIMIT 10

name: where_filter_and
setup: CREATE TABLE trades (instrument_id DOUBLE PRECISION, price DOUBLE PRECISION, quantity DOUBLE PRECISION)
query: SELECT * FROM trades WHERE price > 100 AND quantity > 150 LIMIT 10

name: expression_in_select
setup: CREATE TABLE trades (instrument_id DOUBLE PRECISION, price DOUBLE PRECISION, quantity DOUBLE PRECISION)
query: SELECT instrument_id, price * quantity AS trade_value FROM trades LIMIT 2

name: group_by_sum_count
materialized_view: CREATE MATERIALIZED VIEW stats AS SELECT instrument_id, SUM(quantity) AS total_qty, COUNT(*) AS cnt FROM trades GROUP BY instrument_id
setup: CREATE TABLE trades (instrument_id DOUBLE PRECISION, price DOUBLE PRECISION, quantity DOUBLE PRECISION)

name: group_by_avg
materialized_view: CREATE MATERIALIZED VIEW avg_prices AS SELECT instrument_id, AVG(price) AS avg_price FROM trades GROUP BY instrument_id
setup: CREATE TABLE trades (instrument_id DOUBLE PRECISION, price DOUBLE PRECISION)

name: compilation_determinism
description: Same SQL + catalog produces identical program JSON on all runtimes
setup: CREATE TABLE trades (instrument_id DOUBLE PRECISION, price DOUBLE PRECISION, quantity DOUBLE PRECISION)
queries: SELECT instrument_id, SUM(quantity) FROM trades GROUP BY instrument_id
SELECT * FROM trades WHERE price > 100 LIMIT 10
CREATE MATERIALIZED VIEW mv AS SELECT instrument_id, price FROM trades WHERE price > 100

name: error_unknown_column
setup: CREATE TABLE trades (instrument_id DOUBLE PRECISION, price DOUBLE PRECISION)
